events.name: New York Knicks at Detroit Pistons

headlines.description: — New York's dynamic duo put Detroit on the brink of elimination — with an assist from the officials.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brunson scores 32, Towns adds 27, Knicks beat Pistons as Game 4 ends with missed foul call

events.name: Los Angeles Lakers at Minnesota Timberwolves

headlines.description: — The Minnesota Timberwolves have found a new gear after a regular season of fits and starts.
headlines.shortLinkText: Timberwolves push Lakers to edge of elimination with 116-113 comeback win behind Edwards' 43 points

headlines.description: — Jayson Tatum had 37 points and 14 rebounds, Jaylen Brown added 21 points and 11 rebounds and the Boston Celtics took a 3-1 lead in their NBA playoff series with a 107-98 win over the Orlando Magic on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tatum and Brown pace Celtics past Magic 107-98 to take a 3-1 series lead

headlines.description: — The Indiana Pacers scored at will while the Milwaukee Bucks couldn't recover from the loss of one of their two superstar players.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pacers roll to 129-103 victory in Game 4 to take 3-1 lead after Bucks lose Lillard to injury
